ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drone that flew the mission */,
  "episode" INTEGER /* Episode number of the flight */,
  "total_reward" REAL /* Total reward earned during the flight */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the flight */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the flight */,
  "flight_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the flight (e.g., manual, autonomous) */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* General environmental conditions during the flight (e.g., clear, cloudy, rainy) */,
  "flight_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the flight */,
  "flight_distance" REAL /* Total distance covered during the flight */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who controlled the flight */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the flight */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drones" (
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drone */,
  "drone_name" TEXT /* Name of the drone */,
  "drone_type" TEXT /* Type of drone (e.g., quadcopter, hexacopter) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the drone */,
  "drone_model" TEXT /* Model of the drone */,
  "battery_capacity" REAL /* Battery capacity in mAh */,
  "max_payload" REAL /* Maximum payload capacity in kg */,
  "flight_controller" TEXT /* Type of flight controller used */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software running on the drone */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the drone (e.g., operational, under maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "controls" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control input */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight this control input belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time of the control input */,
  "rotor_speed1" REAL /* Speed of rotor 1 */,
  "rotor_speed2" REAL /* Speed of rotor 2 */,
  "rotor_speed3" REAL /* Speed of rotor 3 */,
  "rotor_speed4" REAL /* Speed of rotor 4 */,
  "pitch" REAL /* Pitch control input */,
  "roll" REAL /* Roll control input */,
  "yaw" REAL /* Yaw control input */,
  "throttle" REAL /* Throttle control input */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who controlled the drone */,
  "control_mode" TEXT /* Mode of control (e.g., manual, auto) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_controls_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_controls_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, pilot) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the flight was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)
